title: More Wolf Armors
description: Add iron, gold, diamond, and netherite wolf armors
body:
This mod adds 4 new wolf armors. Iron, gold, and diamond wolf armors are upgraded from armadillo wolf armors with wolf armor upgrade template and respective material blocks. Netherite wolf armor is upgraded from diamond ones.

Same as vanilla wolf armors, they can absorb damage, and repaired with ingots directly. Each ingot repairs 1/8 of the durability, same as armadillo wolf armor. The exact ratio can be changed in config.

To compensate for covering the collar, the armors have colored stripes that has the same color as the collar, so that players can differenciate their pets easily.

Unlike armadillo wolf armor, the new wolf armors can be enchanted with durability-related enchantment (can be toggled off in config). However, unbreaking on wolf armor works similar to player armor, where Unbreaking III provides ~42% more durability only.

![Wolf Armors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb834fa5c5f10634296304708818443b4864fab2.png)
